name: Michigan & Trumbull
teaser: Probably the best modern take on Detroit-style in the city. Ingredients feel like a step up from the classics.
review: Probably the best of the modern takes on Detroit-style in the city. Ingredients feel like a step up from the classics, but it makes the pie weirdly less specific. It may not be a leap forward, but it's still real good.
headsUp: The best of the modern Detroit-style spots. A step up in ingredients.
update: Ingredient quality remains a step above the classics. Worth the visit.
